branchWarning: CRITICAL: All work MUST remain on geoquant/streaming-ui. Do NOT create new branches, switch branches, or merge. This is a long-running experimental branch.

tasks.description: Extend skipSystemPrompt branch in POST /api/chat to inject skillIds into the systemPromptOverride, so Panel B can receive skill-augmented prompts server-side.
steps: POST /api/chat with skipSystemPrompt: true, systemPromptOverride: 'test', skillIds: ['taste-skill'] produces system message containing both 'test' and skill content
POST /api/chat with skipSystemPrompt: true, systemPromptOverride: 'test', no skillIds produces system message containing only 'test' (unchanged behavior)
POST /api/chat with skipSystemPrompt: true, no systemPromptOverride, no skillIds produces no system message (unchanged behavior)
POST /api/chat with skipSystemPrompt: true, no systemPromptOverride, skillIds: ['taste-skill'] produces system message containing only skill content

tasks.description: Add skill metadata fetching and selection state (pendingSkillIds, appliedSkillIds) to PlaygroundContent component.
steps: On mount, fetch('/api/chat/skills') is called and skills state is populated with array of {id, name, description}
pendingSkillIds (Set<string>) tracks currently checked checkboxes without triggering generation
appliedSkillIds (Set<string>) tracks the skill IDs that were last sent to the API
lastMessageRef stores the most recent user message for replay on skill apply

tasks.description: Add optional actions slot to PanelHeader component. Panel B header gets a skill picker popover with checkboxes and Apply button.
steps: PanelHeader accepts optional 'actions' ReactNode prop rendered in the header row next to the label
Panel A header is unchanged — no actions prop passed
Panel B header shows a skill picker trigger button next to the 'B' label
Clicking the trigger opens a popover with a scrollable list of skill checkboxes showing skill.name
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
'Apply' button is visible at bottom of popover
'Apply' button is disabled while Panel B is streaming
Popover closes after Apply is clicked

tasks.description: Extract Panel B streaming into reusable streamPanelB function. Wire Apply button to re-fire Panel B only with selected skills, resetting Panel B history.
steps: Clicking Apply with skills selected re-generates Panel B output using the last submitted user message
Panel A output is unchanged after Apply
Panel B conversation history is reset on Apply (fresh generation)
The request body includes skillIds alongside skipSystemPrompt: true and systemPromptOverride: BASELINE_PROMPT
If no message has been sent yet, Apply is a no-op or disabled
Changing skills and applying again replaces Panel B output each time (no stacking)
Selecting zero skills and applying re-runs with just the baseline prompt
handleSubmit still fires both panels in parallel using the extracted streamPanelB for Stream 2

patterns: A/B panel comparison: handleSubmit fires two parallel fetch('/api/chat') calls
Panel B uses skipSystemPrompt: true + systemPromptOverride: BASELINE_PROMPT
Skill injection: getSkillContents(ids) returns concatenated skill markdown
PanelHeader component at _PlaygroundPage.tsx:930-959 renders label + Tabs
Panel B state: noPromptTree, noPromptStatus, noPromptRawJsonl, noPromptAbortRef, noPromptReset
runIdRef pattern for staleness guards on async stream callbacks
nonGoals: Persisting skill selection across page reloads
Editing or creating skills from the playground UI
